description: Composition White round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton that has ribbed round neckline with tape detailing on the inseam, short sleeves and graphic print on the front Fitting Slim Wash care Machine wash separately in cold water Use a mild detergent Do not bleach Avoid soaking Remove promptly and line dry inside out in shade Wram iron only Do not iron directly on print/embroidery Update your casual style with this white T-shirt from probase. The colourful graphic print of the Vespa scooters on the front lends this tee a funky nostalgic vibe. Team this with low jeans and sneakers for a cool casual look, while the fabric keeps you feeling fresh and comfortable all day long. Model statistics The model wears size M in t-shirts Height-6'3”, Shoulders-19"
